title: The Ant and the Grasshopper（节选）

sentences.en: In a field one summer's day a grasshopper was hopping about, chirping and singing to its heart's content when an ant passed by, bearing an ear of corn he was taking to the nest.
sentences.zh: 夏日里，在一片田野上，一只蚱蜢跳来跳去，叽叽喳喳地尽情歌唱；这时一只蚂蚁路过，正费劲地拖着一粒玉米往巢穴走去。

sentences.en: "Why not come and chat with me," said the grasshopper, "instead of toiling like that?" "I am storing up food for winter," said the ant, "and recommend you do the same."
sentences.zh: 蚱蜢说：「何必那样辛苦？不如来和我聊聊天。」蚂蚁答道：「我在为冬天储备粮食，你也最好这么做。」

sentences.en: "Why bother about winter?" said the grasshopper; "we have plenty of food now," but when winter came the grasshopper found itself dying of hunger while it saw the ants distributing corn from what they had gathered in summer.
sentences.zh: 蚱蜢反问冬天有什么好担心的，眼下食物充足；可是寒冬一到，蚱蜢饥寒交迫，只能眼睁睁看着蚂蚁拿出夏天囤积的粮食过冬。
